description: Style Note Formal wear skirts are comfort essentials of summer. Make it a stylish season with this arrow skirt while keeping your look uber classy. Pair it with a satin blouse and a pair of high heels to complete the outfit. Product Details A charcoal grey formal skirt with self patterned checks, has a narrow waistband, two buttoned flaps at the back of the waistband, a concealed zipper at the back and a slit from the hemline in the centre back Material and Care 64% polyester, 34% viscose and 2% lycra Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach Line dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 5'8&rdquo and waist 28&rdquo ) is wearing a size 28
